text.title: Business Process Analysis — Enterprise Scale and Governance Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the business-process-analysis methodology end-to-end.

step.name: identify-and-rank
step.action: Score every process by nva_minutes_per_year × strategic_fit; pick top-decile for deep modelling; narrative the rest.

step.name: document-current-state
step.action: For each deep-tier process apply elicitation + frontline-validation; capture VA/BN/NVA per step; log every workaround.

step.name: analyze
step.action: Compute va_pct/bn_pct/nva_pct + cycle/touch/cost ratios; identify pain points (no inference).

step.name: design-future-state
step.action: Produce structured diff table; for ERP gaps follow adopt→configure→extend→build order.

step.name: validate-and-sign-off
step.action: Portfolio-agent reviews; process owner signs off; commit BPMN XML to source control; tag release.
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
